title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma-4 12B, a multimodal language model designed for local inference on consumer laptops with ~16GB VRAM. The model supports agentic workflows and integrates with tools like Ollama, LiteRT-LM, and Hermes, featuring multi-token prediction for reduced latency and an encoder-free architecture.
